title: Appendix 5: Handling of Offertory Collections
summary: This policy establishes required procedures for the secure collection, counting, recording, depositing, and oversight of offertory and special collections at the parish level.
notes: 1) Document is labeled 'Appendix 5' and revised 'Rev 8/14'; effective date is inferred as August 2014 from the revision summary but no explicit calendar date is stated. 2) No next review date or review cadence is specified. 3) Retention period is referenced indirectly ('retained in accordance with the records retention guide') but no specific year duration is stated in this document — a human reviewer should cross-reference the diocesan records retention guide. 4) Owner role is not explicitly identified; CFO is a reasonable inference given the financial controls subject matter, but a Diocesan Finance Officer or Parish Administrator could also be responsible. 5) The document is structured as an appendix, implying it belongs to a larger policy manual; the parent document and full numbering scheme are not visible, so the chapter.section.item address is assigned based solely on the appendix number. 6) QuickBooks and ChurchDB are referenced as specific software systems — reviewers should confirm these remain the current approved platforms. 7) Language was deliberately strengthened from 'should' to 'must' in the August 2014 revision, indicating prior versions exist and a version history should be maintained.
